title: mallotus sathavensis
intro: Mallotus sathavensis, also known as the Thai bird lime plant, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family, Euphorbiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a compound called gedunin, a natural insecticide that has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. Mallotus sathavensis is believed to have several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and prevent infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the seeds of the plant are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including skin infections, wounds, and respiratory issues.
